body: I noticed while doing integrals for the P3 scheme rates that the integral bound for cloud size distribution in SB2006 was returned in `mm`. I think it's ok to keep it in `m`, even though in some other places (aka effective radius and reflectivity calculations) we switch things to `ug` or `mm` for better accuracy. Keeping it in `m` will make it easier for P3 scheme computations.
title: Cleanup in 2M size distributions
